reviews.review_msg: Prof Walsh was fantastic. He taught everything from his notes, and clarified quickly if something wasn't understood. He was mostly approachable, and had plenty of interesting stories which he shared in lecture. Labs were fun, and I would suggest buying the anatomy colouring book. Silly, but an easy way to learn.

straight up...bad prof. his lectures are almost useless to go to because he doesn't really review the notes too much; only talks about how awesome he is. on top of that, he expects you to know every detail of his notes. the labs were fun though and the TA's were great. the class would be great...with another prof

The labs are easily the best part of this course as they are childishly easy but quite fun. Focus on memorization for all exams. Attend his lectures for diagrams he draws, but don't expect to be stimulated apart from his somehwat-funny-at-times jokes. Notes are point by point in a Word document - more or less random facts put together. As for the p

worst teacher ever. I have never given a prof a bad eval, but he deserved it. Does not like to teach which is quite clear as he ends class early all the time(great if you want to pay and not get anything...) tests were unfair but labs were fun as the TAs were great. Avoid this teacher he'll make you quite Kin

this guy is a a horrible professor, i dont know how hes still teaching. his exams barley make sense, and his notes are useless, in every lecture he just goes over irrelevant facts from the notes, and usually talks about his own life stories

he is extremely easy, all you need to do is study is notes and you'll do fine. I got an A, his lectures are very interesting. If you're good at memorizing you'll do fine, and there is no need for you to by the text book.

This class is absolutely ridiculous.  DO NOT TAKE IT ONLINE!!!! When you ask him a question he does not get back to you very quickly, sometimes it takes days to hear a response.  This class is very hard, it is not an introductary class like the title says.  If this class is not mandatory, do not take it.
Very good teacher.  Great personality, makes class fun and interesting.  Tests are very fair.  Will definately take another course with him.

Super good prof!! He's constantly straightforward, lays down everything you need to know! All the topics he tests on exams come from his lecture notes and nothing else, so you have no reason to panic except memorize, memorize, memorize. He also makes lectures enjoyable and ensures people know what they're learning! You MUST put in the effort.
Great prof! Best class ive taken so far. To get a good mark you have to put the work in... He is straight-up and tests are extreamly FAIR. 10/10

Great professor, he has a great interest in what he is teaching which in turn rubs off on students. His lectures are engaging he adds adventure stories about his life which gives the topics a real life perspective. The exams were straightforward, I would recommend knowing everything thing on the lecture noted especially things you can list.

Very hard course, because you gotta study you a__ off if you want to pass. I did just that and escaped with a "B". However, you do learn a lot, and I recommend it to hard working students. I don't recommend it as a credit course.
Very easy professor, cares about the material he teaches, ensures his students understand material, and goes out of his way to explain content in-dept for students who ask for help.
Awesome guy. One of the most helpful and encouraging people I've ever met. I didn't find him difficult to understand. He has a bit of an accent, but his English is very good.

Lectures are fill in the black, so you have to show up. Isnt very clear due to language barrier, but seems to really want to help. Midterm and Final prep was good, but exams still turned out to be very difficult.
